positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a roaring lion and a majestic phoenix flying together against a deep, cosmic gradient background of indigo, gold, and midnight blue. The style should be a vibrant, graphic screen-print aesthetic, featuring bold silhouettes and sharp lines reminiscent of Art Deco and tribal tattoo art. The composition should be central, dynamic, and perfectly balanced, emphasizing the complementary contrast of the fiery phoenix and the powerful lion. Use dramatic backlighting to enhance the luminosity of the gold elements. The overall mood is epic, protective, and triumphant. Vector art quality, clean edges, high contrast, suitable for apparel placement.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, noisy, text, watermarks, logos, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, out of frame, jpeg artifacts, grayscale
